== Notes for [[Item:Q98435|Q98435]] ==

* [http://mechon-mamre.org/p/pt/pt25a03.htm#19 1 Chronicles 3:19.]

Abarbanel – undated handwritten manuscript from the collection of the late Rabbi Shmuel Gorr, held by Chaim Freedman.

Reference was made to “Elef Margaliot” 1993, Meir Wunder.

--------------------

Hananiah was the son of Zorobabel by his third wife. The brother by the same wife was Meshullam who is numbered 4th in the Exilarch list. His sister in the same parentage is Shelomith, wife of Elnathan, Governor of Judea 510-490 BCE. That marriage produced another Davidic lineage.

Neh 3:10; 10:4

Neh 10:4

662 Priest

Neh 10:4

662 Priest

1 Chr 3:19

1 Chr 3:19

Neh 3:10; 10:4

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBC4FBE11EFBBF89829A6488A4D5AE9
geni:6000000008636558623

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
